## Blocker Summary

| Severity | Count | Items |
|----------|-------|-------|
| 🔴 BLOCKING | 3 | Payment processing, checkout flow, delivery automation, storefront |
| 🟡 NON-BLOCKING | 3 | Free product completion, dead CTA, email capture |

**Earliest Possible Launch:** Blocked until payment + checkout + delivery automation resolved

**Recommended Priority Order:**
1. Payment gateway setup (Stripe/PayPal)
2. Email service provider setup
3. Delivery automation build
4. Free product completion (parallel)
5. Storefront section build

7. Soft launch test
